transcript.text: So let's talk about SEO for one of the more challenging categories on Google search your money your life also known as ym yl
So I'm going to start by tell showing you what Google's definition of it is and I'm not going to obviously read this to you
But basically what Google is saying is if you're writing content and targeting keywords that Google thinks will impact people's money
Or their life then they have very high
quality standards for those types of pages so
Effectively what that means is it's very hard to rank for ym yl search terms and it matters
This is key right if Google decides not if you think it is not if I think it is not if your client thinks it is but if Google
Decides that the search term is ym yl. So I'm going to show you a quick example in ah refs
So this is ah refs keywords explore tool and the keyword I typed in is how to lose weight pretty clearly
that's going to be a ym yl and
Ignore this keyword difficulty. This is garbage always always ignore always garbage. So
we come down here to these top 10 results and
What what I'm looking for is what is the domain rating of the top 10 results?
The lowest one is 91
Okay, this is not a search term that we're going to be able to rank for unless our client has a domain rating of at least
91 okay, I don't have very many clients with the domain rating and then in the 90s. Maybe you do
But if a client came to me and said hey, I want to search for how to lose weight
I would look at this and I would say yeah sure we can do that
It'll probably take five years and cost millions of dollars real quick
I said this was trash the reason this number is trash is it only looks at the you you are the URL rating
Okay, it does not account for the domain rating at all and what a ym yl search
Does is it makes the domain rating need to be much much higher to rank for it another quick example
How to invest in the stock market?
We can come down here to the top 10 results and we see something very similar here
The lowest result is 90 so if I have a 90 domain rating then maybe I can
Rank for how to invest in the stock market if I don't have that if I have a domain rating of 30 or 40
No reason to target this keyword. You're not going to rank for it
So we do this quick check for keywords that we've decided to target
We'll do a quick check where we'll put it into ah refs
Glance at the domain rating of the top 10 and make sure that the domain rating of our client or our website of the website
We're trying to rank make sure that the domain rating of the clock of the website
We're trying to rank is at least similar to the domain rating of the websites that are currently ranking
